overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character descending into and walking through a narrow covered urban corridor with digital billboards and graffiti, briefly exploring a steam-filled side alcove, then emerging into a bright futuristic city plaza with towering glass skyscrapers, palm trees, and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with overhead digital advertising

events.description: begins descending stairs into narrow urban corridor
passing under large digital billboards displaying animated advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs and through a narrow covered corridor with graffiti-covered walls and metal grate flooring

entered.detail: concrete stairs descending into the corridor
tall industrial walls with red-brown metal paneling
large illuminated screens displaying advertisements spanning the corridor ceiling
walls covered with colorful street art and tags including skull motifs
drainage grate running down the center of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player descends stairs into a narrow covered urban corridor with industrial metal walls covered in graffiti. Overhead digital billboards illuminate the path as the character walks forward on a concrete sidewalk with a central metal grate, passing sparse pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: steam-filled maintenance alcove off main corridor

events.description: turns right into dark steam-filled side alcove with industrial pipes
turns left back into the main covered corridor

agents.ego_description: briefly detours into a steam-filled side alcove to the right before returning to the main path

entered.detail: dark recessed area with venting steam and industrial equipment
large yellow pipe visible through the steam in the back of the alcove
thick white steam venting from floor grates creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a dark, steam-filled maintenance alcove with industrial pipes and venting steam, exploring the dead-end space before turning back left to rejoin the main corridor. The area is devoid of pedestrians and lit by harsh fluorescent lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor approaching exit to open plaza

events.description: natural daylight becomes visible and increases as approaching the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor toward the bright exit, following a child in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: child in yellow jacket walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: large opening at the end of the corridor leading to the bright exterior

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking through the covered corridor, now with increasing daylight visible ahead. The corridor walls display more graffiti and digital billboards overhead. A child in a yellow jacket walks ahead as the exit to the open city approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with skyscrapers and digital advertising

events.description: exits covered corridor into bright open urban plaza with palm trees and towering skyscrapers
passing through plaza with reflective wet pavement, neon signs, and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking through the open city plaza surrounded by towering glass buildings and neon advertisements, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a bag walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza walkway
towering futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades
large illuminated advertisements and corporate logos on building facades
shiny tiled ground reflecting the buildings and sky
orange and white striped barriers and concrete blocks sectioning off areas

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor into a vast sunlit urban plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. Palm trees line the reflective wet pavement as pedestrians walk through the open space. Construction barriers and outdoor seating areas are visible along the sides of the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn urban corridor into a vast, sunlit futuristic plaza. It begins with a descent down stairs into a narrow passage of industrial metal walls and digital billboards, moving along a concrete sidewalk past a few sparse pedestrians. The camera then veers right into a dark, steam-filled maintenance alcove crowded with pipes and harsh fluorescent lighting before turning back to rejoin the main path. As the character continues forward, the dim corridor begins to brighten with approaching daylight, following a child in a yellow jacket toward the exit. The scene finally opens up as the camera emerges from the enclosure into a wide urban square surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, neon advertisements, and palm trees lining the reflective pavement.
